title: nymphaea ondinea subsp. ondinea
intro: Nymphaea ondinea subsp. ondinea, also known as the water lily, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Nymphaeaceae. The medicinal properties of Nymphaea ondinea subsp. ondinea include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and aiding in the treatment of wounds and burns. Nymphaea ondinea subsp. ondinea is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and has also been used in traditional medicine to create creams and ointments for topical application.
